hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath' | { read -r f; echo "$f" | grep -qE '\.cs$' || exit 0; case "$f" in */aspnetcore/*) sln="aspnetcore/DbLocalizationProvider.Core.sln";; */optimizely/*) sln="optimizely/DbLocalizationProvider.Episerver.sln";; */common/*) sln="common/DbLocalizationProvider.sln";; *) exit 0;; esac; cd "X:/LocalizationProvider" && dotnet format "$sln" --include "$f" --verbosity quiet; } 2>/dev/null || true
